what_it_does: Stores a posted note that comments on a generated keystone image, recording the short observation that its gold looks washed out.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type=note, source=claude_code, state=posted, channel=provider-registry, and author_session.
A links entry of kind commented_on pointing to image://provider-registry/generated/keystone.
History shows a single filed-to-posted transition.
Body is a single sentence: "The gold is washed out."
standards_out: The note is linked to a specific generated image asset via an image:// URI.
The body is an extremely terse, subjective visual/aesthetic observation.
It uses a structured ledger item format for a one-line comment.
conventions: Follows the ledger item schema with YAML frontmatter, id, address, type, source, state, timestamps, and history.
Uses a board:// address for the item and an image:// target for the commented-on asset.
Markdown body separated from frontmatter by ---.
concerns: The note body is vague without the referenced image: "gold" is undefined and no context is given.
No indication of expected appearance, severity, or follow-up action.
The title "Note" is generic and adds no signal.
notes: A one-sentence posted note in provider-registry saying the gold in a generated keystone image looks washed out.
questions: Which specific generated keystone image revision does this refer to?
What does "gold" mean here—color region, material, UI element, or something else?
Is this a bug report, design critique, or casual observation?
What should the gold look like instead?
Is any action or response expected?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated type and state match a posted note; the actual content is a subjective visual comment, but the actionable purpose is unstated.
intention_signals: Appears to flag a perceived color-rendering or aesthetic problem in a generated keystone image, likely as feedback for future iteration.
contribution: Preserves a discrete, timestamped qualitative observation tied to a specific generated image, making subjective visual feedback retrievable in the channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A posted noticeboard note in the provider-registry channel stating that the gold in a generated keystone image appears washed out.
intention_for_embedding: To record a brief visual critique of a generated keystone image for later reference or revision.
